intro:
I couldn't find information about the plant "Staphidium latifolium". However, I can provide information on a related plant "Stachytarpheta latifolia" also known as "Khwang". 

Stachytarpheta latifolia, commonly known as "Khwang", is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family, native to tropical regions. The plant is known for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in treating conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Khwang include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Khwang is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions.
